# Image

**Object**

The component for displaying JPEG, WebP, PNG, or GIF images.

## Declaration

```swift
object Image
```

## Discussion

Image is the general component for images in an article. If possible, choose one of the more specific image-related components such as [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Figure], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Logo], [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Portrait], or [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Photo].



See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/preparing-image-video-audio-music-and-arkit-assets].

### Example

```json
{
  "components": [
    {
      "role": "title",
      "text": "Article Title"
    },
    {
      "role": "image",
      "URL": "bundle://summer.jpg",
      "caption": "Thanks to the record drought, mountain lions have begun to descend from the peaks."
    }
  ]
}
```

## Images

- **Photo**: The component for including a photograph.
- **Figure**: The component for including a figure.
- **Portrait**: The component for including an image of a person.
- **Logo**: The component for including a logo image.
- **ReplicaAdvertisement**: The component for delivering digital versions of print advertisements.
- **CaptionDescriptor**: The object you use in image components for displaying captions when the image is full-screen.

## Inherits From

- Component
